name: pre-vibe
description: Codex workflow plugin that turns rough first-session requests into project-specific starting context, handbook guidance, and a compact first prompt.

interface.shortDescription: Turn rough starts into clean Codex starting context.
interface.longDescription: Pre-Vibe is a Codex workflow plugin for new sessions. It helps Codex clarify vague requests, run safe project and Codex-component indexing, build task-specific starting documents, and continue with only a compact first prompt after user approval.
defaultPrompt: Prepare my rough task with Pre-Vibe.
Build project starting context before work.
Clarify this new Codex session first.
